name: Sentinel · P0-P3 合规哨兵
description: System-level enforcement of the P0-P3 decision matrix. Blocks P0 operations, requires approval for P1, and tracks cumulative operation risk via path-based sensitivity matching and operation count thresholds.

targetAgents.description: Agent IDs to enforce. Empty = all agents.

auditDir.description: Directory for audit logs. Default: memory/

p0BlockNotify.description: Send DM notification on P0 block events

writeThreshold.description: Max write+edit calls before auto-upgrade to P1

dirThreshold.description: Max distinct top-level dirs before auto-upgrade to P1

p0Paths.description: Path patterns that trigger P0 block

p1Paths.description: Path patterns that trigger P1 approval

enabled.label: Enable Sentinel
enabled.help: Globally enable or disable P0-P3 enforcement.

targetAgents.label: Target Agents
targetAgents.help: Agent IDs to enforce. Leave empty to apply to all agents.

p0BlockNotify.label: P0 Block Notifications
p0BlockNotify.help: Send DM notification when P0 operations are blocked.

writeThreshold.label: Write Count Threshold
writeThreshold.help: Auto-upgrade to P1 after this many write+edit calls per session.
